Design Tokens

Teikn v2.0.0-alpha.11 · Generated Thu Apr 23 2026 1:38:21

Token Types

  • Getting Started
  • color
  • font-family
  • font-size
  • font-weight
  • typography
  • spacing
  • border-radius
  • border
  • shadow
  • duration
  • timing
  • transition
  • gradient
  • opacity
  • line-height
  • letter-spacing
  • breakpoint
  • size
  • aspect-ratio
  • z-layer

Getting Started

This project generates design tokens in multiple formats. Import the file that matches your stack:

JSON tokens.json 
// Import as a module
import tokens from './tokens.json';

// Or fetch at runtime
fetch('./tokens.json').then(r => r.json())
TypeScript (runtime + declarations) tokens.d.ts 
import { tokens } from './tokens.mjs';

tokens.tokenName

// Or use typed group accessors
import { color } from './tokens.mjs';
color('primary')
SCSS Map tokens.scss 
@use 'tokens' as *;

// Access tokens by name
get-token('token-name')

// Or use typed group accessors
color('primary')
CSS Custom Properties tokens.css 
<link rel="stylesheet" href="./tokens.css">

/* Then use variables anywhere in your CSS */
var(--token-name)
Storybook tokens.stories.tsx 
// View in Storybook
npx storybook dev
DTCG tokens.tokens.json 
// W3C Design Token Community Group format
// Import into Style Dictionary, Tokens Studio, or other DTCG-compatible tools

color

#4682b4
color-primary
#4682b4
rgb(70, 130, 180)
hsl(207.3, 44%, 49%)
Lum 0.206
Aa Aa Aa Aa
vs white 4.11:1 ✗ AAAA: WCAG AA requires 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text (18pt+ or 14pt bold).

Fails — 4.11:1 is below the 4.5:1 threshold. ✗ AAAAAA: WCAG AAA requires 7:1 for normal text, 4.5:1 for large text (18pt+ or 14pt bold).

Fails — 4.11:1 is below the 7:1 threshold.
vs black 5.11:1 ✓ AAAA: WCAG AA requires 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text (18pt+ or 14pt bold).

Passes — 5.11:1 meets the 4.5:1 threshold. ✗ AAAAAA: WCAG AAA requires 7:1 for normal text, 4.5:1 for large text (18pt+ or 14pt bold).

Fails — 5.11:1 is below the 7:1 threshold.

vs white 4.99:1 ✓ AAAA: WCAG AA requires 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text (18pt+ or 14pt bold).

NameValueTypeUsage
color-primaryrgba(70, 130, 180, 1)colorPrimary branding color
color-secondaryrgba(220, 20, 60, 1)color
color-successrgba(34, 139, 34, 1)colorUse for success states
color-warningrgba(218, 165, 32, 1)colorUse for warning states
color-errorrgba(255, 0, 0, 1)colorUse for error states
color-text-primaryrgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95)colorUse for prominent text
color-text-secondaryrgba(0, 0, 0, 0.54)color
color-linkrgba(70, 130, 180, 1)color
color-surfacergba(255, 255, 255, 1)color
color-backgroundrgba(250, 250, 250, 1)color
color-on-surfacergba(0, 0, 0, 0.87)color
color-on-primaryrgba(255, 255, 255, 1)color
color-on-secondaryrgba(255, 255, 255, 1)color
color-on-successrgba(255, 255, 255, 1)color
color-on-errorrgba(255, 255, 255, 1)color

typography

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs.

400
lineHeight

letterSpacing
normal

typography-body

fontSize: 1rem
fontWeight: 400
lineHeight: 1.5
letterSpacing: normal
typography
typography-heading
fontFamily: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif
fontSize: 2.25rem
fontWeight: 700
lineHeight: 1.2
letterSpacing: -0.02em

line-height

line-height-tight 1.2
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs. How vexingly quick daft zebras jump.
